{{nihongo|'''Takemikakano- Shrine'''|多祁美加々命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takemikakano- Shrine'''|多祁美加々命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takemikakano- Shrine'''|多祁美加々命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takemikakano- Shrine'''|多祁美加々命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Takemikakano- Shrine | native_name = 多祁美加々命神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Takemikakano- Shrine | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Takemikakano- Shrine'''|多祁美加々命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takemikakano- Shrine'''|多祁美加々命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Takemikakano- Shrine'''|多祁美加々命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takemikakano- Shrine'''|多祁美加々命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Takemikakano- Shrine | native_name = 多祁美加々命神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Takemikakano- Shrine | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Takemikakano- Shrine'''|多祁美加々命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takemikakano- Shrine'''|多祁美加々命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].
